mapper.select: /* RcpMapper.getRcpList */ SELECT (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0032' AND CD_VAL = A.SERVICE_TYPE) AS SERVICE_NAME /* 선후불_이름 */ ,A.RES_NO /* 예약번호 */ ,A.SCAN_ID /* 스캔 ID */ ,A.MEMO AS REQUEST_MEMO /* 메모 */ ,B.CSTMR_NAME /* 고객명 */ ,NVL( TRIM(B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN), '') AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN /* 외국인 등록번호 */ ,NVL( B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION, '') AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION /* 외국인 국적 */ ,TRIM(B.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN) || '-' || trim(B.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN) || '-' || trim(B.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN) AS CSTMR_MOBILE /* 휴대폰번호 */ ,CASE WHEN OOIM.ORGN_NM IS NOT NULL THEN OOIM.ORGN_NM || '/' || A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID WHEN A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = '1100011741' THEN 'M모바일(직영온라인)' || '/' || A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID WHEN A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = '1100011744' THEN 'M모바일(사내특판)' || '/' || A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID WHEN A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = '1100011745' THEN '총판(㈜프리피아)' || '/' || A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID ELSE ' ' END AS AGENT_NAME /* 대리점 */ ,(SELECT RATE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD = C.SOC_CODE AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS SOC_NAME /* 요금제 */ ,(SELECT RATE_TYPE FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD = C.SOC_CODE AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS PRDT_SCTN_CD ,(SELECT DATA_TYPE FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD = C.SOC_CODE AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS PRDT_SCTN_CD_NAME ,(SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP9001' AND CD_VAL = A.OPER_TYPE) AS OPER_NAME /* 업무구분 */ ,TO_CHAR(A.REQ_IN_DAY,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REQ_IN_DAY /* 신청일자 */ ,DECODE(A.REQUEST_STATE_CODE, '00', '접수대기', '01', '접수', '08', '배송대기(소화물)', '09', '배송대기(택배)', '10', '배송중', '20', '개통대기', '21', '개통완료' ) AS REQUEST_STATE_NAME /* 진행상태 */ ,'' AS OPEN_REQ_DATE /* 예약처리일자 */ ,DECODE(A.PSTATE,'00','정상','10','고객취소','20','관리자삭제') AS PSTATE_NAME /* 신청서상태 */ /****************고객정보****************/ ,A.CSTMR_TYPE /* 고객구분 */ ,A.SERVICE_TYPE /* 서비스구분 */ ,C.SOC_CODE /* 요금제 코드 */ ,A.OPER_TYPE /* 업무구분 */ /*,CSTMR_NAME*//*고객명*/ ,B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_PN /* 여권번호 */ ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_BIRTH, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_BIRTH ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_BIRTH, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYMMDD') AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_BIRTH2 ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_DOD ,B.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_CNAME /* 법인명 */ ,B.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN /* 법인번호 */ ,SUBSTR(B.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER,1,3) AS CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER1 /* 법인사업자등록번호*/ ,SUBSTR(B.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER,4,2) AS CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER2 /* 법인사업자등록번호*/ ,SUBSTR(B.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER,6,5) AS CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER3 /* 법인사업자등록번호*/ ,B.CSTMR_PRIVATE_CNAME /* 상호명 */ ,SUBSTR(B.CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER,1,3) AS CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER1 /* 개인사업자등록번호*/ ,SUBSTR(B.CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER,4,2) AS CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER2 /* 개인사업자등록번호*/ ,SUBSTR(B.CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER,6,5) AS CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER3 /* 개인사업자등록번호*/ ,B.CSTMR_MAIL ,B.CSTMR_MAIL_RECEIVE_FLAG /* 메일수신여부 */ ,B.CSTMR_ADDR /* 고객정보_주소 */ ,B.CSTMR_ADDR_DTL /* 고객정보_상세주소 */ ,B.CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE /* 고객정보_명세서종류*/ ,TRIM(B.CSTMR_TEL_FN) || '-' || TRIM(B.CSTMR_TEL_MN) || '-' || TRIM(B.CSTMR_TEL_RN) AS CSTMR_TEL ,A.ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE /* 온라인_인증방식 */ ,A.ONLINE_AUTH_INFO /* 온라인_인증정보 */ ,A.PSTATE /* 신청서_상태 */ ,A.REQUEST_STATE_CODE /* 가입진행_코드 */ ,A.ON_OFF_TYPE /* 온라인오프라인구분*/ ,DECODE(A.ON_OFF_TYPE, '1', '오프라인', '2', '홈쇼핑', '온라인' ) AS ON_OFF_NAME /* 모집유형*/ ,'' AS PAPER_INFO /* 서식지정보 */ ,A.PHONE_PAYMENT AS PHONE_PAYMENT /* 휴대폰결제 */ /****************배송정보****************/ ,D.DLVRY_NAME /*배송정보_이름*/ ,TRIM(D.DLVRY_TEL_FN) || '-' || TRIM(D.DLVRY_TEL_MN) || '-' || TRIM(D.DLVRY_TEL_RN) AS DLVRY_TEL ,TRIM(D.DLVRY_MOBILE_FN) || '-' || TRIM(D.DLVRY_MOBILE_MN) || '-' || TRIM(D.DLVRY_MOBILE_RN) AS DLVRY_MOBILE ,D.DLVRY_ADDR /*배송정보_주소*/ ,D.DLVRY_ADDR_DTL /*배송정보_상세주소*/ ,D.DLVRY_MEMO /*배송정보_요청사항*/ /****************요금납부정보****************/ ,A.REQ_PAY_TYPE /*요금납부방법*/ ,E.REQ_BANK /* 신청정보_계좌이체_은행*/ ,E.REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER /* 신청정보_계좌이체_계좌번호*/ ,E.REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME /* 신청정보_계좌이체_예금주*/ ,E.REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN ,E.REQ_CARD_COMPANY /*카드사*/ ,E.REQ_CARD_NO ,E.REQ_CARD_MM /*유효기간월*/ ,E.REQ_CARD_YY /*유효기간년*/ ,E.REQ_CARD_NAME /* 신청정보_신용카드_명의자*/ ,E.REQ_CARD_RRN /****************가입신청정보****************/ , A.REQ_BUY_TYPE /*구매유형*/ , A.REQ_MODEL_NAME AS PRDT_CODE /*단말기모델코드*/ , MSPD.PRDT_ID AS PRDT_ID /*단말기ID*/ , A.REQ_WANT_NUMBER /*가입희망번호1*/ , A.REQ_WANT_NUMBER2 /*가입희망번호2*/ , A.REQ_WANT_NUMBER3 /*가입희망번호3*/ , translate(G.REQ_GUIDE_FLAG,'YN','10') AS REQ_GUIDE_FLAG /*신청정보_번호연결서비스_여부*/ , trim(G.REQ_GUIDE_FN) || '-' || trim(G.REQ_GUIDE_MN) || '-' || trim(G.REQ_GUIDE_RN) AS REQ_GUIDE , (case when INSTR(E.REQ_WIRE_TYPE,'AY')>0 then 1 else 0 end) AS REQ_WIRE_TYPE1 /*신청정보_무선데이터_이용_타입*/ , (case when INSTR(E.REQ_WIRE_TYPE,'AN')>0 then 1 else 0 end) AS REQ_WIRE_TYPE2 /*신청정보_무선데이터_이용_타입*/ , (case when INSTR(E.REQ_WIRE_TYPE,'DN')>0 then 1 else 0 end) AS REQ_WIRE_TYPE3 /*신청정보_무선데이터_이용_타입*/ /****************번호이동정보****************/ , trim(G.MOVE_MOBILE_FN) || '-' || trim(G.MOVE_MOBILE_MN) || '-' || trim(G.MOVE_MOBILE_RN) AS MOVE_MOBILE , G.MOVE_COMPANY /*번호이동정보_변경전통신사*/ , G.MOVE_THISMONTH_PAY_TYPE /*번호이동정보_이달사용요금납부방법*/ , G.MOVE_ALLOTMENT_STAT /*번호이동정보_휴대폰_할부금상태*/ , G.MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG /*번호이동정보_미환급액요금상계동의_여부*/ , G.MOVE_AUTH_TYPE /*번호이동정보_인증유형*/ /****************법정대리인정보****************/ , H.MINOR_AGENT_NAME /*법인_대리인_성명*/ , H.MINOR_AGENT_RELATION /*미성년자_법정대리인_관계*/ , H.MINOR_AGENT_RRN , trim(H.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN) || '-' || trim(H.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN) || '-' || trim(H.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN) AS MINOR_AGENT_TEL , A.REQUEST_KEY /*가입신청키*/ , F.ADDITION_KEY /*부가서비스키*/ , F.ADDITION_NAME /*부가서비스명*/ , A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID AS AGENT_CODE , A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID , B.CSTMR_POST , DECODE(A.CLAUSE_PRI_COLLECT_FLAG,'Y',1,0) AS CLAUSE_PRI_COLLECT_FLAG /*약관_개인정보_수집_동의 */ , DECODE(A.CLAUSE_PRI_OFFER_FLAG,'Y',1,0) AS CLAUSE_PRI_OFFER_FLAG /*약관_개인정보_제공_동의 */ , DECODE(A.CLAUSE_ESS_COLLECT_FLAG,'Y',1,0) AS CLAUSE_ESS_COLLECT_FLAG /*약관_고유식별정보_수집이용제공_동의*/ , DECODE(A.CLAUSE_PRI_TRUST_FLAG,'Y',1,0) AS CLAUSE_PRI_TRUST_FLAG /*약관_개인정보_위탁_동의 */ , DECODE(A.CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG,'Y',1,0) AS CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG /*약관_개인정보_광고전송_동의 */ , DECODE(A.CLAUSE_CONFIDENCE_FLAG,'Y',1,0) AS CLAUSE_CONFIDENCE_FLAG /*약관_신용정보_이용_동의 */ , A.REQ_USIM_SN /*신청정보_USIM일련변호*/ , A.REQ_PHONE_SN /* 신청정보_휴대폰_일련번호*/ , TRANSLATE(NVL(OTHERS_PAYMENT_AG,'N'), '10','YN') AS OTHERS_PAYMENT_AG /*타인납부*/ , SPC_CODE , D.DLVRY_POST , G.MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER , TRIM(B.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN) AS CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN ,'가입비 : ' || C.JOIN_PRICE || ' / 유심비 : ' || C.USIM_PRICE || (case when oper_type ='MNP3' then ' / ' || ' 번호이동 시 수수료 800원' end ) AS TRMNL_INFO , TRANSLATE(NVL(REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG,'N'), '10','YN') AS REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG /*타인납부*/ , I.REQ_AC_TYPE , C.MODEL_INSTALLMENT , C.REAL_MDL_INSTAMT AS REAL_MDL_INSTAMT /* 할부원금 */ , NVL(C.RECYCLE_YN, 'N') AS RECYCLE_YN , C.MODEL_DISCOUNT1 , C.MODEL_DISCOUNT2 AS MODEL_DISCOUNT2 /* 공시지원금 */ , C.MODEL_DISCOUNT3 AS MODEL_DISCOUNT3 /* 대리점지원금 */ , C.JOIN_PRICE , C.USIM_PRICE , C.MODEL_PRICE , C.MODEL_PRICE_VAT , NVL(C.MODEL_PRICE, 0) + NVL(C.MODEL_PRICE_VAT, 0) AS HNDST_AMT /* 출고가VAT포함 */ , NVL(C.MAX_DISCOUNT3, 0) AS MAX_DISCOUNT3 /* 추가지원금(MAX) */ , NVL(C.DC_AMT, 0) AS DC_AMT /* 할인금액 */ , NVL(C.ADD_DC_AMT, 0) AS ADD_DC_AMT /* 추가할인금액 */ , A.REQ_ADDITION_PRICE , NVL(C.MODEL_MONTHLY, 0) AS INST_NOM , NVL(A.SHOP_NM, OOIM2.ORGN_NM || '/' || OOIM2.ORGN_ID) AS SHOP_NM , DECODE(CUM.USR_NM, NULL, '-', CUM.USR_NM || '/' || CUM.USR_ID) AS USR_NM , I.REQ_AC01_BALANCE , I.REQ_AC02_DAY ,(CASE WHEN I.REQ_AC_TYPE='01' THEN I.REQ_AC01_AMOUNT WHEN I.REQ_AC_TYPE='02' THEN I.REQ_AC02_AMOUNT END ) AS REQ_AC_AMOUNT , A.REQ_MODEL_COLOR , J.TB_CD , J.DLVRY_NO , A.MANAGER_CODE , MSPM.SALE_PLCY_CD , MSPM.SALE_PLCY_NM , A.FAXYN , A.FAXNUM , A.FAXNUM AS FAX_BY_SEARCH , C.MODEL_ID , TO_CHAR(NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT, 0)) AS AGRM_TRM , MSPD.MNFCT_ID , A.REQ_MODEL_NAME AS REQ_MODEL_NAME , A.REQ_USIM_NAME AS REQ_USIM_NAME , DECODE(A.REC_YN, 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS REC_YN , A.OPEN_MARKET_REFERER , DECODE(A.NW_BLCK_AGRM_YN, 'Y', 1, 0) AS NW_BLCK_AGRM_YN , DECODE(A.APP_BLCK_AGRM_YN, 'Y', 1, 0) AS APP_BLCK_AGRM_YN , A.APP_CD , DECODE(B.SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN, 'Y', 1, 0) AS SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN , B.SELF_CERT_TYPE , B.SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT , B.SELF_ISSU_NUM , DECODE(H.MINOR_SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN, 'Y', 1, 0) AS MINOR_SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN , H.MINOR_SELF_CERT_TYPE , H.MINOR_SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT , H.MINOR_SELF_ISSU_NUM ,K.DVC_CHG_TYPE ,K.DVC_CHG_RSN_CD ,K.DVC_CHG_RSN_DTL_CD ,C.USIM_PAY_MTHD_CD ,C.JOIN_PAY_MTHD_CD /****************JEJU요금제관련정보****************/ ,DECODE(A.CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG,'Y',1,0) AS CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG /*약관_제휴서비스_동의*/ ,B.CSTMR_JEJU_ID ,C.SPRT_TP FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP A ,MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP B ,MCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO@DL_MCP C ,MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_MCP D ,MCP_REQUEST_REQ@DL_MCP E ,( SELECT REQUEST_KEY ,LISTAGG(ADDITION_KEY, ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY ADDITION_KEY) ADDITION_KEY /*부가서비스_키*/ ,LISTAGG(ADDITION_NAME, ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY ADDITION_NAME) ADDITION_NAME /*부가서비스_키*/ FROM MCP_REQUEST_ADDITION@DL_MCP GROUP BY REQUEST_KEY ) F ,MCP_REQUEST_MOVE@DL_MCP G ,MCP_REQUEST_AGENT@DL_MCP H ,MCP_REQUEST_PAYMENT@DL_MCP I ,MCP_REQUEST_DVC_CHG@DL_MCP K ,ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST OOIM ,ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST OOIM2 ,CMN_USR_MST CUM ,MSP_SALE_PLCY_MST MSPM ,CMN_INTM_MDL MSPD ,(SELECT * FROM (SELECT /*+INDEX_DESC*/ ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY REQUEST_KEY ORDER BY REQUEST_STATE_KEY) ORD,REQUEST_KEY ,TB_CD,DLVRY_NO FROM MCP_REQUEST_STATE@DL_MCP) WHERE ORD=1) J WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.REQUEST_KEY = D.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.REQUEST_KEY = E.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.REQUEST_KEY = F.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.REQUEST_KEY = G.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.REQUEST_KEY = H.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.REQUEST_KEY = I.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.REQUEST_KEY = J.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.REQUEST_KEY = K.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = OOIM.ORGN_ID(+) AND A.SHOP_CD = OOIM2.ORGN_ID(+) AND A.SHOP_USM_ID = CUM.USR_ID(+) AND C.MODEL_SALE_POLICY_CODE = MSPM.SALE_PLCY_CD(+) AND C.MODEL_ID = MSPD.PRDT_ID(+) AND A.REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

SELECT /* RcpMgmtMapper.orgnInfo */ A.ORGN_ID, A.ORGN_NM, A.HGHR_ORGN_CD, B.ORGN_NM AS HGHR_ORGN_NM, A.TYPE_CD, A.FAX, A.TYPE_DTL_CD2 FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST A, ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST B WHERE A.HGHR_ORGN_CD = B.ORGN_ID(+) AND A.ORGN_ID = #{orgnId}
